Privacy Policy for Refloow Photo Studio

Refloow Photo Studio is a locally hosted desktop application. We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting it.

Data Collection and Use
This application does not collect, store, transmit, or share any personal information, telemetry, user data, or files. All photo editing and image processing are performed entirely locally on your device.

Third-Party Access
Because no data is collected, no data is shared with or sold to any third parties.

Transparency and Open Source
We believe in complete transparency. Refloow Photo Studio is open-source, meaning anyone can inspect the source code to verify our privacy claims. You can view the code and follow our development on GitHub at: https://github.com/Refloow/Refloow-Photo-Studio

Contact
If you have any questions regarding this privacy policy, please contact refloowcontact@gmail.com
